title: stelis molleturoi
intro: Stelis molleturoi, also known as the Molleturo orchid, is a species of orchid native to Ecuador. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly in the treatment of various health issues, including fever, respiratory problems, and digestive issues. The health benefits of Stelis molleturoi include its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which help to reduce inflammation and fight off infections. In traditional medicine, Stelis molleturoi is often prepared as a tea or infusion by steeping the roots and leaves in hot water, and is also used in herbal remedies to promote overall well-being.
